scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix vendor install && npm --prefix vendor-ui install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,vendor,vendor-ui -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:vendor" "npm run dev:vendor-ui"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:vendor && npm run build:vendor-ui
